subcodes.first_line: O Majíd! The Spirit hath descended in His glory from My Kingdom, and He Who conversed with God with His signs, and the Beloved One with His ascension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مجید قد نزل الروح بمجده من ملکوتی و الکلیم بایاته و الحبیب بمعراجه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @personal instructions, @proclamation to Christians, @consolation and comfort, @Christ; Christianity
